name: get_weather
description: Get the current weather for a given city.

city.description: Name of the city to get weather for, e.g. 'Mumbai'

name: search_logs
description: Search security logs for entries matching a query within an optional time range.

query.description: Search term or pattern to look for in the logs, e.g. 'failed login'

time_range.description: Time window to search within, e.g. 'last_24h', 'last_7d'

name: check_ip_reputation
description: Check whether a given IP address has a known bad reputation (malware, spam, botnet activity).

ip.description: The IP address to check, e.g. '203.0.113.5'
